thoughts: As I read about the vastness and intricacies of our oceans, I find myself drawn to stories of marine life and their unique adaptations. The intricate relationships between species provide fascinating insights into ecosystems and survival strategies.

This link explores a range Sams' story as he became a professional football player.
The book is based on the true story of Michael Sam, a former college football player who was drafted by the St. Louis Rams in 2014 and then cut just hours after being signed due to concerns about his off-field behavior. The book tells the story of how Sam came out as gay and struggled to come to terms with his sexuality while also trying to make it in the NFL.
Overall, I think this book would be a great read for anyone interested in sports, coming out stories, or just following the lives of people who are living through significant life changes.
